## Meeting Purpose

[Handoff Relay content generation process from Ife to Kelvin.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Handoff:** Kelvin will take over content generation from Ife, using the Notion doc as the single source of truth for all client context and process details.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Dry Run:** Kelvin will process one article with Bailey and Ife available for support, ensuring a smooth transition and validating the documented workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [**Client Management:** Bailey remains the Managing Editor (ME). Jakub will join the client check-in to introduce himself and begin building a list of strategic recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**Critical Risk:** A new, untested "disclosure step" in the content pipeline requires close monitoring to ensure compliance in this regulated industry.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)

## Topics

### Handoff Documentation & Process

  - [The Notion doc is the central repository for all client context, including:](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Links to all client artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [General do's and don'ts](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
      - [Specific client challenges](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [**Writing Guidelines:** Updated reactively as compliance issues are identified.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Ife's Process:** Kelvin can review Ife's Perplexity/Claude conversations in sections 4.3 & 4.4 to see the current, effective workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=536.0)
  - [**Dry Run:** Kelvin will process one article to validate the process.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
      - [Ife will assign the article.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=916.0)
      - [Bailey and Ife will be available for support.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)

### Client Context & Strategy

  - [**Client Status:** Happy with content quality; minimal feedback received.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [**Jakub's Role:** Join the client check-in to introduce himself and gather info on:](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
      - [Client goals and key metrics](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Past content efforts (\~250 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
      - [Opportunities for blog layout improvements (e.g., CTAs)](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Publishing Blocker:** Publishing has been stalled.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
      - [**Proposed Solution:** Add CTAs directly in Contentful, mirroring the Webflow process, to unblock the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)

### Team Roles & Logistics

  - [**Managing Editor (ME):** Bailey remains the ME.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This retains deep client knowledge and ensures a smoother transition than an ME-to-ME handoff.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [**Cloud Projects:** Jakub will confirm if cloud projects can be migrated to his pod.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [**Access:** Bailey will ask Yusuf to add Jakub to the necessary pod.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [Finalize Notion doc with Ife.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
      - [Add Kelvin to the internal channel.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [Propose adding CTAs in Contentful at the client check-in.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=775.0)
  - [**Ife:**](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
      - [Assign Kelvin's dry run article in the internal channel.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Confirm cloud project migration feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
      - [Prepare questions for the client check-in.](https://fathom.video/share/wghMVPEV-tXVD7J9xB4QWBVktW6u6Be9?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
